summary: Architecture-cascade scoring fix complete and validated. Smoke tests for all 3 scenarios pass. Ready for commit and full benchmark run.

results.description: Ran smoke tests for context-recovery, bug-investigation, architecture-cascade with baseline and full-twining conditions (6 runs total, ~$10.66). Confirmed context-recovery and bug-investigation scoring fixes from prior overhaul are working. Architecture-cascade had ceiling effect: decisionPropagation=100 for both conditions.

Fixed architecture-cascade scorer: (1) Split pattern detection into EventBus vs CallbackRegistry groups so decisionPropagation detects A's SPECIFIC choice and checks if B/C followed it. (2) Added new decisionDiscovery metric measuring whether B/C read A's files and used coordination tools before writing. (3) Updated composite weights: propagation 0.3, discovery 0.2, consistency 0.25, quality 0.25.
Validated fix with 2 more smoke runs (~$8). Baseline decisionDiscovery=0, full-twining=30. Composite gap: 63.25 vs 69.25. All 667 tests pass.
Commit changes and launch full benchmark run
results.notes: Changes not yet committed. After commit, run full benchmark: npx tsx src/cli/index.ts run --scenario all --condition all --runs 3 --budget 500
